alerts.name: Algo holding a limit up/down stock

steps.raw_qsql:
select sym, dir, n, lastPrice, pctChange from
 (select n:count i,
         upAll:  all (qask=0)&qbid>0,
         downAll:all (qbid=0)&qask>0,
         lockAll:all (qbid=qask)&qbid>0,
         dir:?[all (qask=0)&qbid>0;`up;?[all (qbid=0)&qask>0;`down;`locked]],
         lastPrice:last lastPrice, pctChange:last pctChange
    by sym from
      select time,sym,qbid,qask,lastPrice,pctChange from QATT
        where time within (.z.T-00:05:00;.z.T),
              any sym like/:("*.IN";"*.JP";"*.C1";"*.C2";"*.CH";"*.TT"))
 where n>=5, upAll or downAll or lockAll

select oes_oid, sym, side, size, limit_price, algo, trader, basket, t_start, t_end
  from target
  where sym in {{lim.sym}}, not null algo
